title: Who is the best cook
wikitext:
[]: Who is the best cook?             Quote Post by Joseki » Sat Sep 02, 2017 6:22 pm This needs to be settled. In 2.0 Asuka and Rei decide to cook for baka-Shinji (the man is unlucky but he gets all the girls), but sadly Masterchef Evangelion edition gets postponed indefinitely because of some minor impact(s), so the question is left unanswered: who is the best cook, Asuka or Rei? Personally I wouldn't eat anything made by a girl who eat pills all the time, but at the same time Asuka is German and that requires caution , so I have to say Rei.

[]: Re: Who cooks better: Asuka or Rei             Quote Post by ErgoProxy » Sat Sep 02, 2017 6:36 pm Mmm-kay, I would eat at Rei's place without any doubt. I've recently discovered some Japanese ready-made food named Oyakata. It's almost nothing but pasta, which is fake and creepy, but sauce, my goodnesss, the sauce! I could kill for it.

[]: Re: Who cooks better: Asuka or Rei             Quote Post by The Cruel » Sun Sep 03, 2017 5:49 am I adore Asuka very much and why wouldn't I want to eat what she cooks? I have absolute faith in her. It would be the best munchies of my life. I don't doubt on Reis cooking either, but I don't want to enrage the red goddess.

[]: Re: Who cooks better: Asuka or Rei             Quote Post by Cybermat47 » Sun Sep 03, 2017 6:27 am Rei is at a disadvantage, given the life she's endured. I may be recalling incorrectly, but didn't her diet consist entirely of pills? Asuka has been exposed to proper food, so she has a better understanding of the matter. That said, Rei is capable of learning (her entire character arc is one of self-discovery, after all), and Asuka's temper could put her at a disadvantage.

[]: Re: Who cooks better: Asuka or Rei             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sun Sep 03, 2017 6:42 am Cybermat47 wrote: didn't her diet consist entirely of pills?

[]: Re: Who cooks better: Asuka or Rei             Quote Post by silvermoonlight » Sun Sep 03, 2017 7:48 am I think they'd both be great cooks but this image of Rei does make me laugh. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Who cooks better: Asuka or Rei             Quote Post by imprimatur13 » Sun Sep 03, 2017 9:47 am Can I just post this? Couldn't resist .

[]: Re: Who cooks better: Asuka or Rei             Quote Post by Rei IV » Sun Sep 03, 2017 3:23 pm Neither. Shinji is were it's at.

[]: Re: Who cooks better: Asuka or Rei             Quote Post by Zeruss » Sun Sep 03, 2017 6:38 pm silvermoonlight wrote: I think they'd both be great cooks but this image of Rei does make me laugh.

[]: Re: Who cooks better: Asuka or Rei             Quote Post by imprimatur13 » Sun Sep 03, 2017 6:41 pm It's nice to see the mother and daughter bonding through cooking. Very WAFF-y. I s'pose you're right, Rei IV. Shin-chan it is. Contest over. Lastly, Joseki, thank you for that image. My new favorite meme. Italian food is superior. To illustrate my point:  SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Who cooks better: Asuka or Rei             Quote Post by Cybermat47 » Sun Sep 03, 2017 8:28 pm imprimatur13 wrote: To illustrate my point:  SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Who cooks better: Asuka or Rei             Quote Post by Rei IV » Sun Sep 03, 2017 8:38 pm Zeruss wrote: The Rei one

[]: Re: Who cooks better: Asuka or Rei             Quote Post by Settie » Sun Sep 03, 2017 9:52 pm Gonna go with Asuka on this one, in 2.0 she at least had knowledge of seasonings so that's a big help when trying to make something. Rei never really had experience with it so even if she were to follow a recipe they tend to leave the seasonings up to personal taste. I could see Rei making the novice mistake of under/over seasoning something.

[]: Re: Who cooks better: Asuka or Rei             Quote Post by silvermoonlight » Mon Sep 04, 2017 2:39 am I can't link this here but there's a none hentai comic by Kuro Tengu called TAMAGOKAKE that has Hikari trying to teach Rei and Asuka to cook but they both suck at it but then you find that Mari sucks worse. Edit sorry for link issue I hope you can see this. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Who cooks better: Asuka or Rei             Quote Post by pwhodges » Mon Sep 04, 2017 3:10 am silvermoonlight wrote: SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Who cooks better: Asuka or Rei             Quote Post by Joseki » Tue Sep 05, 2017 10:23 am Zeruss wrote: The Rei one

[]: Re: Who cooks better: Asuka or Rei             Quote Post by imprimatur13 » Wed Sep 06, 2017 6:44 am Joseki wrote: Thankfully pasta is what we do best.

[]: Re: Who cooks better: Asuka or Rei             Quote Post by silvermoonlight » Wed Sep 06, 2017 11:39 am What is it with everyone cooking angels? お味噌汁？ | メガ [pixiv] https://www.pixiv.net/member_illust.php ... d=11830668

[]: Re: Who cooks better: Asuka or Rei             Quote Post by pwhodges » Wed Sep 06, 2017 12:01 pm Isn't that what everyone does with their defeated enemies?

[]: Re: Who cooks better: Asuka or Rei             Quote Post by silvermoonlight » Wed Sep 06, 2017 12:06 pm pwhodges wrote: Isn't that what everyone does with their defeated enemies?
